item.title: 2026 Global Human Capital Trends
item.description: Article • 9-min read • Our 2026 survey reveals a shift from tensions to tipping points. What intentional choices can organizations make to adapt continuously, move with speed, and lead with a human edge?
item.content:encoded:
Article • 9-min read

Our 2026 survey reveals a shift from tensions to tipping points. What intentional choices can organizations make to adapt continuously, move with speed, and lead with a human edge?

item.title: Quantum computing is coming. How to reduce expensive guesswork to build business value now
item.description: Article • 10-min read • Quantum-inspired methods can bring tangible business value today and build readiness to utilize future quantum computers when they become available. Here’s how.
item.content:encoded:
Article • 10-min read

Quantum-inspired methods can bring tangible business value today and build readiness to utilize future quantum computers when they become available. Here’s how.

item.title: The $9 trillion knowledge exodus: How organizations can turn baby boomer retirements into a competitive advantage

item.content:encoded:
Article • 8-min read

item.title: Gen Zs and millennials are redefining career progression on their own terms

item.content:encoded:
Article • 10-min read

Article • 8-min read

item.title: South Africa’s economic recovery might be delayed, but not derailed
item.description: Article • 10-min read • South Africa’s economic recovery was gaining traction in 2026, until the global oil price shock, firmer inflation, and persistently higher policy rates changed its trajectory.
item.content:encoded:
Article • 10-min read

South Africa’s economic recovery was gaining traction in 2026, until the global oil price shock, firmer inflation, and persistently higher policy rates changed its trajectory.

item.title: Gen AI inside existing search engines overtakes standalone gen AI

item.title: 2026 Digital Media Trends: Capturing always-on fandom between releases and seasons

item.content:encoded:
